testcase.name: Kangur Game Quick Start › opens training setup from quickStart=training and clears query params
Kangur Game Quick Start › starts operation run from quickStart=operation and clears query params
Kangur Learner Profile › renders learner profile shell and baseline sections
Kangur Learner Profile › supports navigation from game screen to learner profile
Kangur Learner Profile › renders deterministic learner metrics from mocked auth, progress, and scores
Kangur Learner Profile › shows the persisted AI tutor mood on the learner profile
Kangur Learner Profile › opens focused lesson from recommendation deep link
Kangur Learner Profile › quick-start training works from profile in local mode
Kangur Learner Profile › quick-start operation works from operation performance links
